response:
TEMPERATURE IS THE MEASURE OF HEAT.
SUN SHINES SO BRIGHT IN SUMMER SEASONS.
SAND STRETCHES SOUTH OF THE SEA SHORES.
SILKY SNAKES SLIDE SLOWLY THROUGH SAND.
SWEET SCENTS OF SEA SALT SWEEP SHORES.
SILVER SHIPS SAIL SLOWLY SOUTH OF SHORES.
STORMS SWEEP SOUTHWARD WITH STRONG SURGES.
SANDY SHORES SEE SO MANY SLEEPING SEALS.
SUNSET SKIES SHOW SHIMMERING SILVER STARS.
SILENT SEAS SURROUND THE SLEEPING SHORES.
SOFT SOUNDS OF WAVES SWEEP SHORES SO SLOWLY.
WAVES ROLL AGAINST THE SHORES WITH FORCE.
STARS SHINE SO BRIGHT IN SILENT SKIES.
